hello.head: 👋 Hi there, I'm Larry
body: 🐨 I'm a graduate software developer based in Australia.
🔥 I'm a engineer with a passion for full-stack software development and computer science.
📈 I'm experienced in building innovative web applications and data-driven solutions that enhance user experience and drive business value.
🛠️ I'm also a dedicated learner, avid problem solver, and effective communicator, aspiring to deliver highly performant solutions that focus on scalability and availability.
School of ICT Award for highest GPA graduate in academic year 2022
Worked in a team of 5 to develop a data processing application addressing a large-scale data problem in the national electricity market research by CAEEPR and AEMO.
Collaborated on programming and developing core app functions using Python and pandas, including Data ETL, Data Query, Data Extraction, Error Handling, and GUI Components.
Enhanced development experience by facilitating clear communication between Dev and Product teams, defining a coherent code base structure, and managing source code version control via GitHub.

Maintained high-quality code by proactively participating in triage, testing, debugging, issue reviews, merging pull requests, publishing iterative code releases, and writing comprehensive technical documentation.
Streamlined pipeline efficiency by saving 80% processing time and resources while eliminating 96% data redundancy.
Earned a finalist position for The Best Innovative Project among 50 competitors by delivering a complete product that met and exceeded client objectives and expectations.
